title: Embrace Mobile Monitoring SDK Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Embrace mobile monitoring SDK.

app_id.description: The application identifier, exactly five characters long.

api_token.description: The hexadecimal API token, exactly thirty-two characters long.

ndk_enabled.description: Enables native crash capture. Defaults to false.

report_disk_usage.description: Whether disk usage collection is enabled. Defaults to true.

enabled.description: Controls whether the SDK connects to the uncaught exception handler. Defaults to true.

capture_request_content_length.description: Whether to capture request content length. Defaults to true.

disabled_url_patterns.description: Regular expression patterns used to exclude URLs from capture.

enable_native_monitoring.description: Enables native monitoring. Defaults to true.

trace_id_header.description: The header name used for trace IDs. Default value explained in the description.

async_end.description: Whether session ends asynchronously. Defaults to false.

max_session_seconds.description: Enables automatic session termination. Must be at least sixty seconds if specified.

automatically_end.description: Whether to automatically end the startup moment. Defaults to true.

take_screenshot.description: Whether to take a screenshot at startup. Defaults to false.

capture_coordinates.description: Controls whether tap coordinates are captured. Defaults to true.

capture_query_params.description: Controls query parameter capture. Defaults to true. Has no effect if web view monitoring is disabled.

enable.description: Controls web view data capture. Defaults to true.
